impact: This advances the PP&D plan by giving fixture-only source inventory checks deterministic rejection reasons for unsafe public inventory fields before any live crawl or authenticated automation can be considered.
summary: Add a narrow, syntax-first public source inventory validator while preserving the existing sentinel contract.
target_task: Task checkbox-67: Add the public source inventory validator only after the syntax-first import test and one-unsafe-field fixture pass, covering allowlisted hosts, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, downloaded documents, credentials, traces, screenshots, and required provenance fields.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
